name: Cherry Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Cherry Juice or Warm Water
1 cup Tart Cherries, well drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in the egg, orange juice, orange peel, and cherry juice (or water), blending only until well moistened.
4. Fold in the chopped cherries and nuts.
5. Pour the batter into prepared pans of your choice.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until done.
